# XZ Cache Manifest

Generated: 2026-05-09 14:36

## Purpose

This cache is a topic-first reading cache for Xu Zhe materials under `/Users/tony/dev/personal/xz/output`.

## Main Files

- `task-list.md`: pre-reading plan and rules.
- `topic-manifest.csv`: one row per topic.
- `coverage-ledger.jsonl`: initial source-unit manifest.
- `final-coverage-ledger.jsonl`: normalized merged completion ledger.
- `coverage-summary.md`: final coverage counts and status distribution.
- `investment-index.md`: keyword navigation index over topic caches.
- `audit.md`: exceptions and follow-up items.
- `agent-roster.md`: reading shard assignments.

## Detail Cache

- `../details/topics/{topic_id}.md`: canonical topic cache or stub for every topic.
- `../details/sources/articles/{article_id}.md`: source cache for large/high-value article sources when created.
- `../details/sources/files/{file_id}.md`: source cache for extracted files when created.
- `../details/ledgers/shard-*.jsonl`: per-shard completion records.
